pro.text: 这是一份 API 延迟测试，通过对比 ISO/OSL 来计算 24 小时内的延迟情况。

paragraphs.source: Here’s a CLI bench comparing token efficiency. Kimi’s 2.5 is pretty good but takes a lot of tokens. This is an expression of token efficiency; realized speed can be much faster even with slower tokens per second.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Here’s a CLI bench comparing token efficiency. Kimi’s 2.5 is pretty good but takes a lot of tokens. This is an expression of token efficiency; realized speed can be much faster even with slower tokens per second.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Here’s a CLI bench comparing token efficiency. Kimi’s 2.5 is pretty good but takes a lot of tokens. This is an expression of token efficiency; realized speed can be much faster even with slower tokens per second.

pro.text: 这是一份对比 Token 效率的 CLI (命令行界面) 基准测试。Kimi 的 2.5 版本表现相当不错，但会消耗大量 token。这正是 Token 效率的直观体现；即便每秒 token 数较低，实际达到的速度也可能快得多。

paragraphs.source: Guys, the world of intelligence work has changed forever. And it’s going to hurt almost all of the incumbents. Do not listen to anyone who tells you that this is good for software companies who will sell more software. Radio over the internet is not a thing.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Guys, the world of intelligence work has changed forever. And it’s going to hurt almost all of the incumbents. Do not listen to anyone who tells you that this is good for software companies who will sell more software. Radio over the internet is not a thing.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Guys, the world of intelligence work has changed forever. And it’s going to hurt almost all of the incumbents. Do not listen to anyone who tells you that this is good for software companies who will sell more software. Radio over the internet is not a thing.

pro.text: 各位，知识工作的世界已被彻底颠覆。这势必重创几乎所有的现有巨头。绝不要相信那些声称“这对软件公司是利好，能让他们卖出更多软件”的论调。就像“互联网广播”根本是个伪命题一样（译注：指新技术会诞生全新的业态，而非简单地将旧模式搬上新平台）。

pro.text: 结论：模型即新的 TCP/IP

issues.description: 译文将 vibe coded 译作“直觉编程”，但 Glossary 中已明确规定 Vibe coding 应译为“氛围感编程”。该问题同样出现在第9段中。
英文字母与中文字符之间缺少必要的空格（出现两次）。
英文字母与中文字符之间缺少必要的空格。
译文将 Information work 译为“知识工作”，但 Glossary 明确规定其应译为“信息工作”。

paragraphs.source: In the 1970s and 1980s there was considerable competition to TCP/IP. The OSI, IBM SNA, Novell IPX/SPX, and other protocols were all in contention. But as you now know, no one cares, it’s really about the best information that’s built on top of the packets in the internet. We are at that same important point, and Claude Code is the first proof point. 4% of GitHub and rising is generated a day from Claude Code alone.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In the 1970s and 1980s there was considerable competition to TCP/IP. The OSI, IBM SNA, Novell IPX/SPX, and other protocols were all in contention. But as you now know, no one cares, it’s really about the best information that’s built on top of the packets in the internet. We are at that same important point, and Claude Code is the first proof point. 4% of GitHub and rising is generated a day from Claude Code alone.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In the 1970s and 1980s there was considerable competition to TCP/IP. The OSI, IBM SNA, Novell IPX/SPX, and other protocols were all in contention. But as you now know, no one cares, it’s really about the best information that’s built on top of the packets in the internet. We are at that same important point, and Claude Code is the first proof point. 4% of GitHub and rising is generated a day from Claude Code alone.

pro.text: 在 20 世纪 70 和 80 年代，TCP/IP 面临着激烈的竞争。OSI 模型、IBM 的 SNA (系统网络架构)、Novell IPX/SPX 以及其他协议都曾参与角逐。但正如你现在所知，没人再关心这些底层协议，真正重要的是构建在互联网数据包之上的优质信息。我们目前正处于同样关键的历史节点，而 Claude Code 就是首个证明。如今，GitHub 上每天有 4% 且仍在不断攀升的代码量，仅由 Claude Code 一己之力生成。

译文将 Information work 译为“知识工作”，但 Glossary 明确规定其应译为“信息工作”。

paragraphs.source: The future is going to be about how agents can harness large amounts of tokens to build bigger and better projects. Claude Code is the first website and our best glimpse into the further Agentic future. Information work is about to accelerate meaningfully, and competition is about to skyrocket.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The future is going to be about how agents can harness large amounts of tokens to build bigger and better projects. Claude Code is the first website and our best glimpse into the further Agentic future. Information work is about to accelerate meaningfully, and competition is about to skyrocket.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The future is going to be about how agents can harness large amounts of tokens to build bigger and better projects. Claude Code is the first website and our best glimpse into the further Agentic future. Information work is about to accelerate meaningfully, and competition is about to skyrocket.

pro.text: 未来的核心在于智能体（指能够自主规划并执行复杂任务的 AI）如何驾驭海量 token，从而构建规模更庞大、质量更卓越的项目。Claude Code 犹如初代网站，为我们提供了窥探更深远智能体化未来的最佳窗口。信息工作即将迎来实质性的加速，竞争必将呈指数级飙升。
